CREATE TABLE teams (team String, player String, salary UInt32, position String) ENGINE = Memory;

INSERT INTO teams FORMAT Values ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Gary Chen', 195000, 'F'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Charles Juarez', 190000, 'F'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Michael Stanley', 150000, 'D'), ('New Coreystad Archdukes', 'Scott Harrison', 150000, 'D'), ('Port Elizabeth Barbarians', 'Robert George', 195000, 'M');
CREATE TABLE performance (player String, matches UInt32, goals UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO performance FORMAT Values ('Gary Chen', 10, 5), ('Charles Juarez', 8, 3), ('Michael Stanley', 12, 4), ('Scott Harrison', 11, 7), ('Robert George', 6, 2);
SELECT player, salary, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY position ORDER BY salary DESC) AS row_num FROM teams;
SELECT team, player, salary, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary DESC) AS row_num FROM teams;
SELECT p.player, p.matches, p.goals, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY p.goals DESC) AS goal_rank FROM performance AS p;
SELECT team, player, salary, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY team ORDER BY salary) AS row_num FROM teams WHERE salary > 150000;

SELECT player, salary, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS row_num FROM (SELECT team, player, salary FROM teams WHERE position = 'F' UNION ALL SELECT team, player, salary FROM teams WHERE position = 'D') AS combined;
WITH (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM teams) AS avg_salary SELECT player, salary, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY salary DESC) AS row_num FROM teams WHERE salary > avg_salary;
SELECT t.player, t.salary, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY t.position ORDER BY p.goals DESC) AS row_num FROM teams AS t JOIN performance AS p ON t.player = p.player;
